description: Metallic tones with jewel encrusted floral prints on this catwalk sandal. Buy this pair to experiment with your styling, and you won't regret it. Upper Tough footbed in a metallic tone with engraved design Two transparent plastic straps on the forefoot and midfoot with jewel encrusted floral patterns Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
